creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
diff -Nru p5-HTML-Mason.orig/Makefile p5-HTML-Mason/Makefile
--- p5-HTML-Mason.orig/Makefile	Thu Apr 12 02:13:11 2001
+++ p5-HTML-Mason/Makefile	Fri Apr 20 11:23:11 2001
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	HTML-Mason
-PORTVERSION=	1.01.5
-DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-1.015
+PORTVERSION=	1.02
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	HTML
diff -Nru p5-HTML-Mason.orig/distinfo p5-HTML-Mason/distinfo
--- p5-HTML-Mason.orig/distinfo	Thu Apr 12 02:13:11 2001
+++ p5-HTML-Mason/distinfo	Fri Apr 20 11:24:42 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (HTML-Mason-1.015.tar.gz) = a4e92af6963184b820dd39ddfdaafa8c
+MD5 (HTML-Mason-1.02.tar.gz) = 47a64b6c6f7885fa7192c7a9382fa998
